description: Senior software engineer with 9 years at top-tier companies, quantified achievements, advanced degrees, and cloud certifications
resumeText:
Sarah Chen
san.chen@email.com | (415) 555-0192 | linkedin.com/in/sarahchen | github.com/sarahchen | San Francisco, CA

SUMMARY
Senior Software Engineer with 9 years of experience designing and scaling distributed systems at Google, Stripe, and Dropbox. Proven track record of delivering high-impact infrastructure improvements that directly drive business outcomes. Passionate about developer productivity, platform reliability, and mentoring engineering talent.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Engineer — Google, Mountain View, CA
January 2020 – Present
- Architected and led migration of legacy monolith to microservices, reducing P99 latency by 40% and saving $1.2M annually in compute costs
- Designed Kubernetes-based autoscaling system that handles traffic spikes up to 10x baseline without manual intervention
- Led a team of 6 engineers to build internal CI/CD pipeline used by 300+ engineers, reducing deployment time by 75%
- Implemented distributed tracing (Jaeger + OpenTelemetry) across 25 services, cutting mean time-to-detect (MTTD) incidents from 18 minutes to 4 minutes
- Mentored 4 junior engineers, 2 of whom received promotions within 18 months

Software Engineer II — Stripe, San Francisco, CA
March 2017 – December 2019
- Built and maintained payment processing pipelines processing 2M+ transactions per day with 99.99% uptime
- Optimized PostgreSQL query performance for core billing service, reducing average query time by 65% and eliminating monthly timeout incidents
- Developed internal fraud detection microservice in Go that flagged $4.7M in fraudulent transactions in its first quarter
- Collaborated with product and design to ship 3 major API versioning initiatives with zero customer-facing downtime

Software Engineer — Dropbox, San Francisco, CA
June 2015 – February 2017
- Contributed to Dropbox's file sync engine in Python, improving sync reliability for 500M+ users
- Implemented Redis-based caching layer for metadata service, reducing database load by 55%
- Participated in on-call rotation, resolving 30+ production incidents with documented post-mortems

EDUCATION
M.S. Computer Science — Stanford University, 2015 (GPA: 3.9)
B.S. Electrical Engineering & Computer Science — UC Berkeley, 2013 (GPA: 3.8)

SKILLS
Languages: Python, Go, Java, TypeScript, SQL, Bash
Infrastructure: Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, Helm, Istio
Cloud: AWS (EC2, ECS, Lambda, RDS, S3), GCP (GKE, BigQuery, Cloud Run)
Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, Cassandra, DynamoDB
Streaming: Kafka, Pub/Sub, Kinesis
Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, Jaeger, PagerDuty
Tools: Git, GitHub Actions, ArgoCD, Jenkins

CERTIFICATIONS
- AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional (2023)
- Google Cloud Professional Data Engineer (2022)
- Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA) (2021)

PROJECTS & PUBLICATIONS
- Open-source contributor to Kubernetes (15 merged PRs, 400+ GitHub stars on personal tooling repo)
- Speaker: "Scaling Distributed Systems at Stripe" — SREcon Americas 2019
- Co-authored internal whitepaper: "Reducing Developer Toil with Platform Engineering" (2022)
